nasb.text: His brothers saw that their father loved him more than all his brothers; and so they hated him and could not speak to him on friendly terms.

esv.text: But when his brothers saw that their father loved him more than all his brothers, they hated him and could not speak peacefully to him.

cnv.text: 約瑟的哥哥們見父親愛約瑟過於愛他們，就恨約瑟，不能與他和和氣氣地說話。

ccb.text: 约瑟的哥哥们见父亲偏爱他，就怀恨在心，对他恶言相向。

csbs.text: 约瑟的哥哥们看见父亲爱约瑟胜过他所有的兄弟，就恨约瑟，不能与他和气地说话。
